task.title: Generate a Discovery Report
task.shortdesc: Generate and inspect discovery.json so planning starts from verified package structure.

prereq.p: Have read access to the package and a writable directory for reports.
For first-time onboarding, save one discovery report as a baseline so you can compare future runs.

step.cmd: Run discovery and write JSON output to disk.
Inspect the summary counts and invariant status.
Inspect map artifact metadata and relationships for the expected entry map.

info.codeblock: jq '.artifacts[] | select(.artifact_type=="map") | {path, classification, confidence, metadata}' build/discovery.json jq '.relationships[] | select(.type=="topicref") | {source, target, pattern_id}' build/discovery.json

step.cmd: Optional: enforce invariant failure as a hard stop.

result.p: You have a validated discovery artifact that can be normalized into planning input.
result.codeblock: discovery.json includes: artifacts[] relationships[] summary invariants
